name: Turtle Cake
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 9x13 baking dish. Prepare the cake according to package directions. Pour half of the cake mix into the prepared dish and bake for 15 minutes. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt caramels with butter and evaporated milk. Remove the cake from the oven and pour the melted caramel mixture over the top. Top with chocolate chips and pecans. Pour the remaining batter over everything and bake an additional 20 minutes.
